title: SoulTame SMP
description: SoulTame SMP is a new friendly Lifesteal SMP
body:
Welcome to SoulTame SMP - The Ultimate Faction Warfare Experience!

Prepare yourself for an unparalleled adventure where faction warfare, strategy, and survival collide! SoulTame SMP is a Lifesteal-based Minecraft server that brings together intense gameplay mechanics, dynamic economies, and epic quests into one thrilling package.

---------------- **_FEATURES_** ---------------
Vampirism + addons - becoming vampires & werewolf
Create + Addons - create industrial structures & trains as well as so much more with create

----------------  **_WHY TO USE THIS PACK_** --------------
there is not much incentive unless you seek to join the SMP or host your own server of it

What Awaits You?
Faction Warfare: Rally your allies and lead your faction to victory! Claim territory, wage wars, and outsmart rival factions to reign supreme.
Lifesteal Mechanics: Every kill makes you stronger—steal hearts from your enemies and climb to the top!
Dynamic Economy: Engage in trading, build your wealth, and become a tycoon in our player-driven economy.
Exciting Quests: Take on thrilling quests to earn rewards, unlock treasures, and uncover the secrets of SoulTame SMP.
Airships, Planes & Ships: Master the skies and seas with custom vehicles. Build airships, pilot planes, or set sail to expand your empire.
Bounties: Place or collect bounties on rival players for gold, glory, or revenge!
Custom Features: Enjoy an immersive world packed with custom plugins, mechanics, and a balanced mix of magic, technology, and combat.
Why Join SoulTame SMP?
A welcoming community of players who thrive on strategy and adventure.
Regular updates and new features to keep gameplay fresh and exciting.
A balanced system that caters to both casual and competitive players.
Endless opportunities for creativity, whether you’re a builder, fighter, trader, or strategist.
Server Details
IP: In our server FAQ
Version: Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)
